arguments.title: Weather Update for Shanghai - 2026-05-30
arguments.body: The weather in Shanghai tomorrow (May 30, 2026) will be clear with temperatures ranging from 17.9°C to 27.8°C. No rain is expected, so there's no need to bring an umbrella.
